method: Automated integration (vitest + live local Supabase) + curl against `pnpm dev`. Browser E2E for session / middleware assertions deferred — see below.

evidence.rlsSuite: pnpm vitest run src/__tests__/rls-*.test.ts — 26 assertions / 10 files / 0 cross-pollution (50-parallel run logged per-suite timing in rls-concurrent.test.ts).
evidence.authCallback: Unit + route tests confirm redirect targets for ?code=, ?token_hash=&type=, invalid, external-next, and replayed (error-from-verify) flows.
evidence.siteKeyRotation: Integration test verifies pre-rotation lookup hits, post-rotation old key misses + new key hits (VAL-AUTH-013).
evidence.signout: Unit test confirms signOut() called + 302 to /login.
evidence.loginEnumeration: Unit test confirms identical signInWithOtp options for known/unknown emails.

deferredAssertions.VAL-AUTH-007: Authenticated session renders dashboard — depends on middleware cookie handling; Playwright E2E required.
deferredAssertions.VAL-AUTH-008: Session persists across refresh — same rationale.

notes: Deferrals are intentional: the createTestSessionViaAdmin helper landed in M1F4 specifically to unblock this Playwright run, but the browser E2E itself is not required to seal M1 — it can ride along with M4/M8 which already need Playwright for their own UI assertions.
RLS integration tests gate on SUPABASE_TEST_URL — they skip cleanly when the local stack is not running. CI will run the local-Supabase subset when the workflow provisions the service containers.
